name: Curse of the Scarab
gamePlan: The deck floods the board with zombies through tribal synergy, token generation, and reanimation, then exploits zombie count for passive drain, card advantage, and lethal combat. Every zombie entering the battlefield simultaneously grows the army (Diregraf Colossus, Necroduality), replaces itself on death (Wilhelt, the Rotcleaver), triggers card draw (Kindred Discovery, Undead Augur), and increases the upkeep drain from The Scarab God.
winLine: Gray Merchant burst drain off black devotion

finishers.name: Gray Merchant Burst Drain
finishers.note: Gray Merchant of Asphodel drains each opponent for your black devotion on ETB.

finishers.name: Lord-Pumped Zombie Combat + Cyclonic Rift
finishers.note: With two lords in play, 2/2 zombie tokens are 4/4s.

finishers.name: Aristocrats Drain
finishers.note: Plague Belcher drains **each opponent** for 1 life per zombie death — 3 across the table per death in a 4-player pod.

finishers.name: Mass Reanimation into Burst Drain
finishers.note: Buried Alive or Entomb stocks the graveyard with high-impact zombies (Grave Titan, Gray Merchant, Rot Hulk).

finishers.name: Rooftop Storm Explosion
finishers.note: Rooftop Storm makes all zombie spells cost {0}.

finishers.name: Warren Soultrader Loop
finishers.note: Warren Soultrader + Gravecrawler + Plague Belcher is a three-card mana-neutral loop.
